name: HRC_DL_REM_TEMPLATES_VL
query: SELECT b.template_id ,b.template_code ,b.category ,b.status ,b.enterprise_id ,b.created_by ,b.creation_date ,b.last_updated_by ,b.last_update_date ,b.last_update_login ,b.object_version_number ,tl.template_name ,tl.template_description FROM hrc_dl_rem_templates_b b ,hrc_dl_rem_templates_tl tl WHERE b.template_id = tl.template_id AND tl.language = userenv ('LANG')
